title: Batch Operation Optimization
impact: 100x speedup on batch update operations by building lookup Maps; Completes Phase 6 performance optimizations

tasks.description: Optimize batchUpdate with Lookup Map - Build Map from entity names to array indices before processing updates, replacing O(n) find() calls with O(1) Map lookups
testCategories: All existing batchUpdate tests must pass

currentCode.description: Current O(n×m) implementation - finds entity by name for each update

optimizedCode.description: Optimized O(n+m) implementation - build index once, lookup by name

stepByStep: After loading the graph, add: const entityIndex = new Map<string, number>();
Replace find() loop with indexed lookup using entityIndex.get()
Use graph.entities[idx] to access the entity
acceptanceCriteria: Map built from entity names to indices before update loop
All find() calls replaced with Map.get() lookups
No changes to method signature or return type

tasks.description: Review Other Batch Operations - Scan EntityManager for any other methods using repeated find() calls that could benefit from Map optimization

methodsToReview: addTagsToMultiple - Check if it loops with find()
lookFor: Multiple calls to loadGraph() in sequence
Any O(n) operation inside a loop

acceptanceCriteria: All methods reviewed for batch optimization opportunities

tasks.description: Final Benchmark and Documentation - Run all benchmarks, document final metrics, calculate improvement factors for all Sprint 2-4 optimizations

implementation.table: | Operation | Pre (ms) | Post (ms) | Improvement | Algorithm Change |

acceptanceCriteria: Final metrics documented with improvement factors

tasks.description: Version Bump and Phase Completion - Update version to 9.3.0, update CHANGELOG.md with Phase 6 performance improvements, mark phase complete

sections: - O(1) NameIndex for entity existence checks
- Map-based batch updates (100x faster for large batches)

acceptanceCriteria: All sprint TODO files status changed to 'completed'

successCriteria: batchUpdate uses Map for O(1) entity lookups
All batch operations reviewed and optimized where applicable
notes: This sprint completes Phase 6. The batchUpdate optimization follows the same pattern as deleteEntities (Sprint 2) - building a lookup structure once rather than searching repeatedly. After this sprint, all identified 'quick win' optimizations from the Future Features Roadmap will be complete. The version bump to 9.3.0 reflects these performance improvements.
